memoryArtifacts.description:
BYU Film Number 355556
EGBERT GENEALOGY
Descendants of Egbert Sanderson Collateral Lines A-Z, This genealogy was Collected and organized in 5 volumes by Darrell Dwight Matthews.  Microfilmed May 1963.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Henry Edson於1480年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾阿德波利時，他的父親Henry Edson6歲，母親Edson6歲。他於1499年與Juliana Bustard在英國奧可福爾阿德波利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1540年在他的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Henry Edson于1480年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾阿德波利时，他的父亲Henry Edson6岁，母亲Edson6岁。他于1499年与Juliana Bustard在英国奧可福爾阿德波利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1540年在他的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Edson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Edison
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): from the Middle English personal name Ed(de) (a pet form of male and female names beginning with Ed-, such as Edwin , Edward , and Edith , all derived from Old English names beginning with ēad ‘prosperity’) + -son. Occasionally, the name may also be a shortened form of Middle English Edithson ‘son of Edith’, or come from the Middle English female personal name Edus (a pet form of Edith) + -son.

History: The inventor Thomas Alva Edison, born in 1847 in Milan, OH, came from a Canadian family first established in North America by John Edison, a loyalist during the American Revolution, who served under the British General Richard Howe and went into exile in NS, Canada, after the Revolutionary War.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Henry Edson was born in 1480, in Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Edson, was 6 and his mother, Edson, was 6. He married Juliana Bustard in 1499, in Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 8 daughters. He died in 1540, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Henry Edson est né en 1480, à Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Edson, avait 6 ans et sa mère, Edson, avait 6 ans. Il a épousé Juliana Bustard en 1499, à Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé en 1540, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Henry Edson 1480 in Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Edson 6 und seine Mutter Edson 6. Er hat 1499 in Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England Juliana Bustard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb 1540 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Henry Edson è nato il nel 1480 nel Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry Edson, aveva 6 anni e il suo madre, Edson, aveva 6 anni. Lui sposato Juliana Bustard nel 1499, nel Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1540, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Henry Edsonが1480年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアアッドエルブリーで生まれた時，父Henry Edsonは6歳，母Edsonは6歳であった。1499年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアアッドエルブリーでJuliana Bustardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1540年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Henry Edson(이)가 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 애더버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Edson(은)는 6세였고, 그의 어머니 Edson(은)는 6세였다. 그는 1499년 영국 스퍼드실르 애더버이에서 Juliana Bustard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1540년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Henry Edson nasceu em 1480, em Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Edson, tinha 6 anos e sua mãe, Edson, tinha 6 anos. Ele casou-se com Juliana Bustard em 1499, em Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1540, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Henry Edson родился в 1480 г. в местности аддирбури, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Edson было 6 лет, а матери, которую звали Edson, 6. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana Bustard в 1499 г. в местности аддирбури, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер в 1540 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Henry Edson nació en 1480, en Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Edson, tenía 6 años y su mamá, Edson, tenía 6 años. Se casó con Juliana Bustard en 1499, en Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1540, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
